title: cyclodium cumingianum
intro: Cyclodium cumingianum, also known as the mountain fern or Cuming's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Cyclodium cumingianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
